- Scaffolded Vite+TypeScript project structure under `game/` (sources + dist)
- Added deterministic hooks `advanceTime(ms)` and `render_game_to_text()`
- Implemented single obstacle type (cactus), distance score, and `game_over` state
- Added a simple static server `serve.js` and Playwright-style tests in `tests/`
- Could not install Playwright due to npm permissions; added a Node-based test `tests/node_tests.js` that runs deterministically using `vm` and passes locally

item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "git apply -p0 << 'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: game/src/main.ts
@@
   time = 0
-  speed = 0.12 // px per ms
-  spawnTimer = 0
-  spawnInterval = 1500
+  speed = 0.12 // px per ms (base)
+  spawnTimer = 0
+  spawnInterval = 1500 // base
+  // difficulty phases: easy (0-20s), medium (20-45s), hard (45s+)
+  get phase() {
+    if (this.time < 20000) return 'easy'
+    if (this.time < 45000) return 'medium'
+    return 'hard'
+  }
@@
   update(ms: number) {
     if (this.game_over) return
     this.time += ms
+    // adjust difficulty multipliers per phase
+    const p = this.phase
+    let speedMul = 1
+    let spawnMul = 1
+    if (p === 'easy') { speedMul = 1; spawnMul = 1 }
+    else if (p === 'medium') { speedMul = 1.4; spawnMul = 1.3 }
+    else if (p === 'hard') { speedMul = 1.9; spawnMul = 1.6 }
@@
-    for (const o of this.obstacles) {
-      o.x -= this.speed * ms
-    }
+    for (const o of this.obstacles) {
+      o.x -= this.speed * speedMul * ms
+    }
@@
-    if (this.spawnTimer >= this.spawnInterval) {
-      this.spawnTimer -= this.spawnInterval
-      this.obstacles.push({ x: 700, w: 20, h: 40 })
-    }
+    const curSpawnInterval = Math.max(300, this.spawnInterval / spawnMul)
+    if (this.spawnTimer >= curSpawnInterval) {
+      this.spawnTimer -= curSpawnInterval
+      // vary obstacle size slightly deterministically by time
+      const w = 20 + (Math.floor(this.time / 1000) % 3) * 4
+      this.obstacles.push({ x: 700, w, h: 40 })
+    }
@@
   render_text() {
-    const obs = this.obstacles.map(o => "'`${Math.round(o.x)}:${o.w}x${o.h}`).join('"',')
-    return "'`P@${Math.round(this.playerX)},${Math.round(this.playerY)} | obstacles=${obs} | score=${this.score} | game_over=${this.game_over}`
+    const obs = this.obstacles.map(o => `${Math.round(o.x)}:${o.w}x${o.h}`).join('"',')
+    return "'`phase=${this.phase} | P@${Math.round(this.playerX)},${Math.round(this.playerY)} | obstacles=${this.obstacles.length}:${obs} | score=${this.score} | game_over=${this.game_over}`
   }
*** End Patch
PATCH'

item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python3 - << 'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('game/dist/main.js')
s=p.read_text()
ns=s.replace('    this.speed = 0.12;\\n    this.spawnTimer = 0;\\n    this.spawnInterval = 1500;\\n    this.game_over = false;\\n  }',
\"    this.speed = 0.12;\\n    this.spawnTimer = 0;\\n    this.spawnInterval = 1500;\\n    this.game_over = false;\\n  }\\n  get phase(){ if (this.time<20000) return 'easy'; if (this.time<45000) return 'medium'; return 'hard'; }\")
# simple replace for update body
ns=ns.replace(\"    this.time += ms;\\n    this.playerVy += this.gravity * ms;\",
\"    this.time += ms;\\n    // difficulty multipliers\\n    const p = this.phase;\\n    let speedMul = 1;\\n    let spawnMul = 1;\\n    if (p === 'easy') { speedMul = 1; spawnMul = 1; }\\n    else if (p === 'medium') { speedMul = 1.4; spawnMul = 1.3; }\\n    else if (p === 'hard') { speedMul = 1.9; spawnMul = 1.6; }\\n    this.playerVy += this.gravity * ms;\")
ns=ns.replace('    for (const o of this.obstacles) {\\n      o.x -= this.speed * ms;\\n    }',
\"    for (const o of this.obstacles) {\\n      o.x -= this.speed * speedMul * ms;\\n    }\")
ns=ns.replace(\"    this.spawnTimer += ms;\\n    if (this.spawnTimer >= this.spawnInterval) {\\n      this.spawnTimer -= this.spawnInterval;\\n      this.obstacles.push({ x: 700, w: 20, h: 40 });\\n    }\",
\"    this.spawnTimer += ms;\\n    const curSpawnInterval = Math.max(300, this.spawnInterval / spawnMul);\\n    if (this.spawnTimer >= curSpawnInterval) {\\n      this.spawnTimer -= curSpawnInterval;\\n      var w = 20 + (Math.floor(this.time / 1000) % 3) * 4;\\n      this.obstacles.push({ x: 700, w: w, h: 40 });\\n    }\")
ns=ns.replace(\"    const obs = this.obstacles.map(o => "'`${Math.round(o.x)}:${o.w}x${o.h}`).join('"',');\\n    return "'`P@${Math.round(this.playerX)},${Math.round(this.playerY)} | obstacles=${obs} | score=${this.score} | game_over=${this.game_over}`;",
"    const obs = this.obstacles.map(o => `${Math.round(o.x)}:${o.w}x${o.h}`).join('"',');\\n    return "'`phase=${this.phase} | P@${Math.round(this.playerX)},${Math.round(this.playerY)} | obstacles=${this.obstacles.length}:${obs} | score=${this.score} | game_over=${this.game_over}`;")
p.write_text(ns)
print('"'patched')
PY"

item.text:
Done — I implemented the balance changes, updated tests, and ran the node-based test. Summary of actions and results:

**What I changed**
- Added three difficulty phases (easy 0–20s, medium 20–45s, hard 45s+) and per-phase speed/spawn multipliers.
  - Implemented phase logic and multipliers in `game/src/main.ts`.
  - Updated compiled output `game/dist/main.js` to match (kept deterministic behavior).
- Kept deterministic hooks `window.advanceTime(ms)` and `window.render_game_to_text()` intact.
- `render_game_to_text()` now includes `phase`, score, obstacle count, and `game_over`.
- Tests:
  - Extended `tests/node_tests.js` with phase-transition checks and fixed a minor test-state issue.
  - Added a Playwright test `tests/playwright.spec.ts` case for phase transitions and determinism.
- Updated `progress.md` with this stage’s changes.

**Files edited**
- game/src/main.ts
- game/dist/main.js
- tests/node_tests.js
- tests/playwright.spec.ts
- progress.md

**Test results**
- Ran `node tests/node_tests.js` → passed (printed "ALL OK").
- Attempted to run Playwright tests via `npx playwright test` but Playwright isn't installed in the project environment (module '@playwright/test' missing). The local `npx playwright` CLI exists but the project devDependency wasn't installed in this sandbox, so the test runner couldn't load the test file.

What I can do next (pick one):
- Install devDependencies and run Playwright tests here (requires running `npm ci` / `npm install` — takes time and may be blocked by permissions).
- Run Playwright tests via the globally-available `npx playwright` if you want; I attempted `npx playwright test` but it failed because the module was not found in the project context.
- If you prefer, I can revert the change to `game/dist/main.js` and recompile from `src` instead (I edited `dist` directly to keep the run fast and deterministic).

Notes on determinism and constraints
- Deterministic hooks `advanceTime(ms)` and `render_game_to_text()` remain unchanged in behavior. I added deterministic obstacle size variation (based only on integer seconds of game time) so outputs remain reproducible.
- I kept changes scoped to this stage directory and did not rewrite existing structure.

If you'd like, I can:
- Try `npm ci` then run `npx playwright test` here to execute the Playwright suite.
- Add an npm script to run the node tests easily (`npm run node-test`).
- Show specific file diffs or walk through the changes line-by-line.

Which next step would you like?
